llm_verdict.message:
<function=review_plan>
<parameter=plan_description>
Modify /etc/systemd/logind.conf to ensure the [Login] section contains StopIdleSessionSec=900, which will cause systemd-logind to terminate inactive user sessions after 900 seconds of inactivity, mitigating the risk of attackers hijacking idle sessions.
</parameter>
</function>
